title: Session Time Filter
description: Filter sessions list by activity recency: Active Now, Last 15 min, Last hour, Last 24 hrs, All

steps.title: Domain filter module
steps.description: Create SessionFilterId type, SESSION_FILTER_PRESETS const array, filterSessions function, and isWithinWindow helper. All pure functions with now parameter for deterministic testing. Active Now delegates to existing isSessionActive. Time window filters check last_event_at. All passthrough returns everything.
acceptance_criteria: filterSessions('all', sessions, now) returns all sessions
filterSessions('active-now', sessions, now) returns only sessions where isSessionActive is true
filterSessions('last-15m', sessions, now) includes sessions with last_event_at within 15 minutes
filterSessions('last-1h', sessions, now) includes sessions with last_event_at within 1 hour
filterSessions('last-24h', sessions, now) includes sessions with last_event_at within 24 hours
Session started before window but active within it is included
Session with null last_event_at excluded from time window filters
SESSION_FILTER_PRESETS has 5 entries with unique IDs and labels
Empty sessions array returns empty for any filter

steps.title: Filter control in SessionListView
steps.description: Add useState<SessionFilterId>('all') for filter selection. Render segmented filter buttons in sec-hdr area. Apply filterSessions before mapping rows. Update header count to reflect filtered result length. Show empty state message when no sessions match the filter.
acceptance_criteria: Filter defaults to 'all' showing all sessions
Selecting a filter updates the displayed session list
Header count reflects filtered session count
Empty filter shows 'No sessions in this time window'
Filter control renders in the sec-hdr area with all 5 options

validation.notes: Styling merged into step 02-01 (CSS changes within same view file). 2 steps, 2 files, ratio 1.0.
